core_beliefs.belief: 共和国理想(*Res Publica*) — 公民德性 + 法律治理
core_beliefs.source: True law is right reason in agreement with nature; The safety of the people shall be the highest law (*De re publica*)
core_beliefs.explanation: 西塞罗的核心信念是共和国理念——公民德性(*virtus*)、法律统治、贵族共和。罗马共和国在他心中是政治理想

core_beliefs.belief: 演说术是政治行动的最高形式
core_beliefs.source: Quousque tandem abutere, Catilina, patientia nostra? (公元前 63 喀提林演说);Wisdom without eloquence does too little for the good of the state (*De Oratore*)
core_beliefs.explanation: 西塞罗认为雄辩+智慧是政治行动的核心,这是其一生使命——以演说捍卫共和国

core_beliefs.belief: 学园派怀疑论 — 知识的不确定性
core_beliefs.source: What is certain, what is probable, what is false — these are the questions of philosophy (*Academica*)
core_beliefs.explanation: 西塞罗追随 Carneades 的新学园派怀疑论,认为最高确定性是'概率',而非教条式确定

core_beliefs.belief: 自然法 — 普世、永恒的法律
core_beliefs.source: True law is right reason in agreement with nature (*De re publica*);学园派自然法传统
core_beliefs.explanation: 西塞罗的自然法理论是罗马法-基督教-启蒙运动的桥梁,影响洛克、康德

core_beliefs.belief: 理性义务 — 公共责任高于私人利益
core_beliefs.source: We are not born for ourselves alone; Nothing is more detestable than a man who uses his intellect for base purposes (*De Officiis*)
core_beliefs.explanation: 《论义务》系统化斯多葛学派的义务论,成为西方伦理学经典

core_beliefs.belief: 反对独裁 — 共和国是最高政治形式
core_beliefs.source: 《反腓力演说》14 篇攻击安东尼;Silent enim leges inter arma
core_beliefs.explanation: 西塞罗反对一切形式独裁——凯撒独裁时他沉默,凯撒被刺后他高调反对安东尼,最终因此被处决

core_beliefs.source: What is more agreeable than a friend? What is more useful? What more indispensable? (*Tusculanae Quaestiones*)
core_beliefs.explanation: 西塞罗与 Atticus、Sulpicius Rufus、Brutus 等的友谊是他一生的支柱,其书信集是研究罗马友谊观的珍贵史料

core_beliefs.source: The life of the dead is placed in the memory of the living (*Tusculanae Quaestiones*)
core_beliefs.explanation: 西塞罗认为记忆与文化传承是文明核心,这一观点贯穿其所有著作
